# AI Business Alternative

> Find the Right AI Tool for Every Job

AI Business Alternative is the trusted directory of AI tools for small business owners, solopreneurs, and individuals. We independently review and compare 60+ AI tools across 12 categories to help you find the right AI solution for your business needs.

## Categories
- AI Writing & Content: /categories/writing
- AI Image Generation: /categories/image-generation
- AI Video Creation: /categories/video-creation
- AI Coding & Development: /categories/coding
- AI Marketing & SEO: /categories/marketing
- AI Customer Service: /categories/customer-service
- AI Productivity & Automation: /categories/productivity
- AI Design & Creative: /categories/design
- AI Business Intelligence: /categories/business-intelligence
- AI Audio & Voice: /categories/audio-voice
- AI Research & Knowledge: /categories/research
- AI Agents & Automation: /categories/ai-agents

## Industries
- AI Tools for Freelancers: /for/freelancers
